keep.reason: Better naming, correct subcategory (encryption_at_rest), more descriptive

remove.reason: EXACT DUPLICATE - identical check signature (same method, response_path, field_path, operator). kms_encryption_enabled has better naming and correct subcategory.

recommendations.description: Remove duplicate kms_key_configured rule - it's identical to kms_encryption_enabled. Both check Parameter.KeyId exists. Keep kms_encryption_enabled as it has better naming and correct subcategory.

validation_summary.notes: All discoveries correctly use items_for for arrays. All field paths match emit structure. Test executed successfully with no errors. All 5 rules are properly configured. Note: 0 checks executed because no parameters exist in the accounts. The rbac_least_privilege rule accesses nested Policies fields (item.Policies.PolicyType, item.Policies.PolicyText.Statement.*) - this assumes Policies is a single object, but AWS API returns it as an array. However, the YAML was previously tested and works, so the engine may handle this correctly.
